title: Ad-Hoc Alcohol Monitoring Statistics Publication, Dec 2025
body: "This publication sets out statistics on Alcohol Abstinence and Monitoring Requirement (AAMR) orders and the use of Alcohol Monitoring Licence (AML) orders, from 31 July 2025 to 30 November 2025.  Pre-release list  The ad-hoc Alcohol Monitoring publication is produced and handled by the Ministry of Justice’s (MOJ) analytical professionals and production staff. Pre-release access of up to 1 hour is granted to the following persons:  Ministry of Justice  Head of Electronic Monitoring Operations; Deputy Director Sentencing and Offender Management Analysis; Press Officers (x3) "
